policy: exact official-site clone — public Gwangju Buk-gu portal (https://bukgu.gwangju.kr) rendered verbatim, no summary/redesign/approximation
source_url_domain_policy: source_url must be under https://bukgu.gwangju.kr (official public Buk-gu portal). Any other host is rejected.
network_required_at_runtime_policy: normal tests must not require external lookup; network_required_at_runtime must be false for all registered pages.

completeness_note: No complete official content fixtures are committed in this repository as of base SHA afa40dd6f9f0edfd4127ae9fbb542dba73c1c880. Per the exact-clone invariant, synthetic data must not be disguised as official fixture, so no page is registered as 'exact'. All 13 production renderer routes are registered under 'capture_required' (status=capture_required, network_required_at_runtime=false) pending complete official capture. Two deprecated quests are not renderer routes and are excluded from this manifest.
